name: Bruce Wayne
description:
JL; parents meeting.

The Justice League is having a playdate. Barry's twins are painting with peanut butter. Arthur's toddler filled the fish tank with crackers. Diana's daughter is lassoing the ceiling fan. Bruce is standing in the middle of it all with sweet potato on his suit and your daughter in his arms, and he's actually laughing. Clark just called this the real Justice League. Bruce might actually agree.

✦ Domestic Fluff · Dad Bruce · Justice League Chaos ✦
creator: ohmybats
